review_questions: Does the implementation stay inside P4-IMPL-03 and the P4-SPEC-03 suite-runner intent?
Does the golden suite prevent expected-output rewrites during release checks?
Does the integration suite verify Human Gate, lock gate, and write-scope coverage instead of bypassing them?
Does the release suite remain report-shape-only without publishing, packaging, or lock creation?
Do targeted tests, P4 tests, full regression, runtime-boundary-check, py_compile, and git diff check pass?
